display.name: Hermes Coding Agent — Observability
display.description: Comprehensive monitoring for the Hermes coding agent: agent sessions/turns, LLM API calls & token usage, tool-call activity, latency, and errors. Built from OTel traces (service: hermes-agent) using gen_ai.* and hermes.* span attributes. Panels are grouped top-to-bottom: Overview (scorecards), LLM/Model, Agent/Turns, Tool Calls, Errors.

display.name: Agent Turns Over Time
display.description: Root agent span count over time

display.name: Error Spans
display.description: Count of spans with hasError = true

display.name: Errors Over Time
display.description: Spans with hasError = true over time, by span name

display.name: LLM API Calls by Model
display.description: Chat completion call count grouped by requested model

display.name: Cost Proxy: Input vs Output Tokens by Model
display.description: Token volume as a cost proxy by model — no native cost attribute exists; scale by your per-model pricing

display.name: LLM API Call Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
display.description: Duration percentiles of chat completion spans

display.name: Total Tokens by Model
display.description: Sum of total tokens grouped by model

display.name: Recent Error Spans
display.description: Latest failing spans with status message

display.name: Tool Calls by Type
display.description: tool.* span count grouped by operation name

display.name: Tool Usage Summary
display.description: Count and p95 latency per tool type
